name: employment-hero-readonly
description: Read-only Employment Hero access for Claude Desktop: aggregate, PII-minimising HR figures for care directors.
long_description: Connects Claude to your Employment Hero account, read-only. After installing, ask Claude to "connect Employment Hero" once to approve access in your browser, then ask for organisation, team, and work-location lists and headcount. No write access, and no individual employee fields (names, contact details, pay) are ever returned.

tools.name: connect_employment_hero
tools.description: One-time browser sign-in to Employment Hero.

tools.name: connection_status
tools.description: Report whether Employment Hero is connected.

tools.name: list_work_locations
tools.description: List work locations in an organisation.

tools.name: employee_count
tools.description: Total employee count for an organisation.

tools.name: staff_turnover
tools.description: Staff turnover per service over a period.

tools.name: staff_retention
tools.description: Staff retention per service over a period.

tools.name: leavers_by_length_of_service
tools.description: Leavers bucketed by tenure, per service.

tools.name: starters_on_probation
tools.description: Count of staff currently in probation, per service.

tools.name: absence_summary
tools.description: Sickness hours/days and long-term-absence counts per service.

tools.name: bradford_hotspots
tools.description: Bradford Factor absence hotspots per service.

tools.name: verify_api_schema
tools.description: Developer setup probe: API field names and types only (off unless enabled).

client_id.title: Employment Hero Client ID
client_id.description: From your Employment Hero Developer Portal app.

client_secret.title: Employment Hero Client Secret
client_secret.description: From your Employment Hero Developer Portal app. Stored in your OS keychain.

organisation_id.title: Organisation ID (optional)
organisation_id.description: Your Employment Hero organisation ID. Set this so tools work without listing organisations (the app has no organisations scope).

scopes.title: Read-only scopes (space-separated)
scopes.description: Must match the scopes configured on your EH app exactly. Leave as default unless the app changes.
scopes.default: cost_centres:list employees:list employees:show employees:onboard_polling_status employees_certifications:list employees:leave_balances:list employees:rostered_shifts:job_status employees:rostered_shifts:shift_cost:show employees:timesheet_entries:list employees:work_eligibility:show employing_entities:list leave_categories:list leave_requests:list leave_requests:show pay_categories:list rostered_shifts:list rostered_shifts:show teams:list teams:employees:list work_locations:list work_sites:list work_types:list

redirect_port.title: Sign-in callback port
redirect_port.description: Local port used during browser sign-in. Must match the redirect URI registered on your EH app (default 8765).

debug_schema.title: Developer: expose schema probe
debug_schema.description: Adds a verify_api_schema tool reporting API field names and types (never values). Used once during setup. Leave off for normal use.
